metadata.notes: Results from CI pipeline on dedicated benchmark runner. No other workloads.

benchmarks.name: compiled/single_policy_exact
benchmarks.description: Single pre-compiled Allow policy, exact tool match (index hit)

benchmarks.name: compiled/single_policy_wildcard
benchmarks.description: Single pre-compiled policy with wildcard tool match

benchmarks.name: compiled/100_policies_fallthrough
benchmarks.description: 100 policies, match at ~50th (typical worst case with tool indexing)

benchmarks.name: compiled/1000_policies_fallthrough
benchmarks.description: 1000 policies, full scan (default deny)

benchmarks.name: normalize_path/clean
benchmarks.description: Normalize a simple absolute path (no encoding, no traversal)

benchmarks.name: normalize_path/traversal
benchmarks.description: Normalize path with ../.. traversal components

benchmarks.name: normalize_path/encoded_simple
benchmarks.description: Normalize percent-encoded path (single decode iteration)

benchmarks.name: normalize_path/double_encoded
benchmarks.description: Normalize double-percent-encoded path (2 decode iterations)

benchmarks.name: extract_domain/simple
benchmarks.description: Extract domain from URL (strip scheme, port, path)

benchmarks.name: constraint/regex/simple_match
benchmarks.description: Pre-compiled regex constraint match

benchmarks.name: constraint/glob/match
benchmarks.description: Pre-compiled glob constraint match

benchmarks.name: constraint/wildcard_scan/small_params
benchmarks.description: Recursive JSON scanning with wildcard parameter

benchmarks.name: call_chain_hmac/signing_content
benchmarks.description: HMAC-SHA256 signing content construction for call-chain integrity

benchmarks.name: privilege_escalation/no_chain
benchmarks.description: Privilege escalation check with no chain

benchmarks.name: privilege_escalation/10_hop_chain
benchmarks.description: Privilege escalation check with 10-hop chain

benchmarks.name: injection_scanner/inspect_safe_text
benchmarks.description: Aho-Corasick injection scan on clean input (no match)

benchmarks.name: injection_scanner/inspect_injection_hit
benchmarks.description: Aho-Corasick injection scan with match

benchmarks.name: dlp_scanning/scan_params_clean
benchmarks.description: DLP scan on clean response (40 regex patterns, no decode layers)

benchmarks.name: audit_logging/log_single_entry
benchmarks.description: Log single audit entry (SHA-256 hash chain + JSONL serialize)

benchmarks.name: audit_export/to_cef_single
benchmarks.description: Format single audit entry as CEF

benchmarks.name: audit_redaction/redact_simple_clean
benchmarks.description: Redact sensitive keys in action parameters
